ApiError.description:
The shared, transport-neutral error shape.

Every crate reports failures as an `ApiError` so CLI, REST, MCP, jobs, logs,
and progress streams render one consistent structure.

details.description: Redacted structured context (safe key/value pairs only).

visibility.description: Where this error may be surfaced.

ApiError.title: ApiError

ApiError_ErrorSeverity.description: How severe an error is and whether it terminates the item/job.

oneOf.description: Non-fatal issue, full behavior preserved; not terminal.
Behavior reduced but acceptable by policy; may or may not be terminal.
Required work failed; terminal for the affected item/job.

ApiError_ErrorStage.description: Pipeline/transport stage an error is attributed to.

oneOf.description: Missing fields, bad types, unsupported flags.
Internal/unclassified failure within the active operation phase.

ApiError_ErrorVisibility.description:
Where a context entry (or error) may be surfaced.

From the "visibility" field in the error shape: `public`, `internal`,
`sensitive`.

oneOf.description: Safe to render to any caller, including remote/unauthenticated.
Internal diagnostics; render only to internal/admin surfaces.
Sensitive/secret-adjacent; never render raw, redaction required.

Name specific graph nodes (by stable key) for `GraphPrune` debt to
delete. Added so `GraphStore::delete_nodes` has an identity to target
(`docs/pipeline-unification/runtime/pruning-contract.md`, "graph orphan
cleanup").

Name specific memory records for `MemoryPrune` debt to delete via
`MemoryStore::forget`.
Name specific job rows for `JobRetention` debt to delete.
Name specific cache keys for `CachePrune` debt to delete.

Name specific graph nodes (by stable key) for `GraphPrune` debt to
delete. Added so `GraphStore::delete_nodes` has an identity to target
(`docs/pipeline-unification/runtime/pruning-contract.md`, "graph orphan
cleanup").

Name specific memory records for `MemoryPrune` debt to delete via
`MemoryStore::forget`.
Name specific job rows for `JobRetention` debt to delete.
Name specific cache keys for `CachePrune` debt to delete.

actor.description:
User/system identity requesting the cancellation, echoed back on
`JobCancelResult::canceled_by`.

canceled_by.description:
User/system identity that requested the cancellation.
Per `docs/pipeline-unification/runtime/job-contract.md` "Cancellation".

cleanup_debt_ids.description: Cleanup work created for any published partial side effect.

last_safe_stage.description: Last completed safe point (stage phase) before cancellation unwound.

side_effects.description: Published/written side effects that survived the cooperative unwind.

deadline_at.description:
Optional cancellation deadline. Past-deadline `running` attempts are
transitioned to `expired` by the worker claim/heartbeat path.
Per `docs/pipeline-unification/runtime/job-contract.md` "Required Job
Fields" (`deadline_at`).

oneOf.description: Safe to render to any caller, including remote/unauthenticated.

last_progress_at.description:
Timestamp of the last progress-bearing event observed for this job
(distinct from `heartbeat_at`, which is just the liveness ping time).

sequence.description:
Monotonic heartbeat sequence number for this job, per
`docs/pipeline-unification/schemas/event-schema.md`'s `JobHeartbeat` shape.

PrunePlan.description:
A resolved, reviewable plan describing exactly what a prune would delete.

A plan is produced by dry-run resolution and never mutates state. It must be
serializable to JSON for review (safety rule: "prune plans must be
reviewable as JSON").
PrunePlan.title: PrunePlan

PrunePlan_PruneEstimate.description: Estimated impact counts for a plan (what *would* be deleted).

PrunePlan_PruneSelector.description:
The scope of a prune. Each variant resolves to a concrete plan by the
`axon-prune` planner. Variants mirror the pruning contract exactly.

oneOf.description: Prune one generation of a source (generation-fenced).
Prune a single artifact by id (never by arbitrary path).
Job-retention cleanup older than N days.
Cache cleanup older than N days.

PrunePlan_PruneStep.description:
One ordered step in a prune plan. Steps follow the cleanup-debt execution
order (vector → artifact → graph → memory → ledger → job/cache).

graph_edge_ids.description:
Identity for a [`PruneTargetKind::Graph`] edge-delete step, matching
`GraphStore::delete_edges`. Additive.

graph_stable_keys.description:
Identity for a [`PruneTargetKind::Graph`] node-delete step (stable
keys, matching [`axon_graph`]'s `GraphStore::delete_nodes`). Additive —
existing `Vector`/`Ledger` steps never set this.

memory_ids.description:
Identity for a [`PruneTargetKind::Memory`] forget step, matching
`MemoryStore::forget`. Additive.

PrunePlan_PruneTargetKind.description: The store boundary a prune step targets, in cleanup-debt execution order.

oneOf.description:
Delete every point in `collection`, keeping the (now-empty) collection
itself. Distinct from `axon reset`, which also wipes SQLite/job state.

PruneRequest.description:
A request to prune (destructively clean up) some slice of stored state.

Per the pruning contract, prune is never ad hoc deletion: every request
carries a `selector` (scope), a `dry_run` flag (default-safe), a
`require_confirmation` gate for destructive execution, and an audit
`reason`.
PruneRequest.title: PruneRequest

PruneRequest_PruneSelector.description:
The scope of a prune. Each variant resolves to a concrete plan by the
`axon-prune` planner. Variants mirror the pruning contract exactly.

oneOf.description: Prune one generation of a source (generation-fenced).
Prune a single artifact by id (never by arbitrary path).
Job-retention cleanup older than N days.
Cache cleanup older than N days.

PruneResult.description: The outcome of executing a prune plan.
PruneResult.title: PruneResult

PruneResult_PruneCounts.description: Actual deletion counts from an executed prune (the receipt's tallies).

PruneResult_PruneStepResult.description:
Per-step execution outcome. Records what was actually deleted plus any
skipped reason, satisfying the receipt requirement.

PruneResult_PruneTargetKind.description: The store boundary a prune step targets, in cleanup-debt execution order.

offset.description:
Number of leading results to skip before `limit` is applied.
`0` (the default) returns the first page.

time_range.description: Restrict results to a recency window (provider-dependent support).

SearchRequest_SearchTimeRange.description:
Result recency filter for [`SearchRequest`]. Mirrors `spider_agent::TimeRange`'s
four named variants (its `Custom { start, end }` range is not exposed here —
no axon caller has ever constructed one; see `ServiceTimeRange` in
`axon-services`, which has the same four-variant shape).

oneOf.description:
Name specific graph nodes (by stable key) for `GraphPrune` debt to
delete. Added so `GraphStore::delete_nodes` has an identity to target
(`docs/pipeline-unification/runtime/pruning-contract.md`, "graph orphan
cleanup").

Name specific memory records for `MemoryPrune` debt to delete via
`MemoryStore::forget`.
Name specific job rows for `JobRetention` debt to delete.
Name specific cache keys for `CachePrune` debt to delete.
